qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline with 2 years of experience in administration work
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline with 2 years of experience in administration work. Desirable: Similar administrative experience in project-based positions before.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Nagpur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 03-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant post at AIIMS Nagpur is July 3, 2026. Ensure your application reaches them before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant position, candidates must hold a Graduate degree in any discipline and possess at least 2 years of experience in administration work.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Assistant post is 32 years. Age relaxations may be applicable as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Assistant role will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 23,600/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the AIIMS Nagpur Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to prepare their application with all required documents and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process may involve a written test, if deemed necessary by the institute, followed by an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at AIIMS Nagpur is a contractual role. The duration of the contract will be as per the project requirements and institute guidelines.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the Project Assistant position at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Nagpur in this recruitment drive.
